sourceNotes.chargers: Illustrative Chennai charger points for MVP only

routes.label: Short urban connector
routes.description: Shortest distance, but the heaviest stop-go profile.

routes.label: IT corridor express
routes.description: Longer but smoother arterial flow with lower congestion share.

routes.label: Guindy reserve corridor
routes.description: Chosen when arrival battery confidence matters more than distance.

routes.label: Campus shortcut
routes.description: Shortest route into the IIT corridor.

routes.label: Smoother arterial alternative
routes.description: Slightly longer but less stop-go than the shortcut.

routes.label: Taramani reserve approach
routes.description: Adds margin by routing through a corridor with lower congestion risk.
